title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
